prose: Frontier-orbital gap of formaldehyde — DFT tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (single-point, no DFT re-optimization). SCF converged in 8 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = –7.6523067 eV, LUMO = –1.7826355 eV → gap = 5.8696712 eV. Computation invoked with  `chemkit frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --out formaldehyde_frontier_dft.json --stdout path`. Live log is being written to frontier_<timestamp>.out in the working directory. Result JSON: formaldehyde_frontier_dft.json.
